title: Stir Fried Delight
description: A simple and delicious stir fry recipe that's ready in under 20 minutes. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped fried onions and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook until they start to break down, about 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
